title: Beat The Drag!
description:
Hardcore-Vanilla-survival. Allover the internet there are hardcore survival modpacks, but without crazy monsters or overpowered mechanics. 
This is a modpack that takes the vanilla Minecraft to the clouds in a very vanilla way.
body:
Hey! All over the internet, there are hardcore survival modpacks, but without crazy monsters or overpowered mechanics. 
This is a modpack that takes the vanilla Minecraft to the clouds whether you want to beat the dragon in a hella fun and challenging.

1. It includes a bunch of client-side mods that would do well with vanilla Minecraft and just makes MC a lot more alive, optimized, and fun.

2. It has a xp-to-level system, so to be able to use better gear you need to put a lot more work into it. A VETERAN WILL FEEL THE NOSTALGIA OF WHEN THEY HAD TO BUILD THEIR FIRST DIRT HOUSE BECAUSE WHAT ELSE COULD THEY DO?

3. The world has had a makeover with new mobs - both friendly and hostile -, as well as biomes. New structures can be found, caves and more.

4. New survival mechanics have been added for a more realistic touch, such as needing to eat varied, need to drink, and stay energized. 

5. A bunch of very nice vanilla mods for a better and more enjoyable journey. 

6. You can add shaders

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

DO THIS: 
- Download fresh animations if you want the mod to work. Add it to the resource packs folder.
https://github.com/YoungSoulluoS/Fresh-Animations-CEM-fork/releases
- as well as get HopoBetterMineshaft and portals
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hopo-better-mineshaft
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hopo-better-ruined-portals
- I recommend using MultiMC to play the modpack https://multimc.org/

Mods that you might what to play with their setting:
Camera Overhaul.
Biom Particle Weather.
EnhancedVisuals.
LevelZ.
Nox.
True Darkness.

So good luck beating the dragon!!!! Let me know when you do

mods referral:
Macaw's Fences and Walls https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-fences-and-walls
